steps.title: Identify the structural requirements after 'investigated how'
steps.content: The phrase requires normal word order (not inverted) and period punctuation (since the overall sentence is a statement, not a question).

steps.title: Evaluate each choice's word order and punctuation
steps.content: D is correct: “people perceive acts of kindness.” uses normal word order and a period. A and B use inverted word order “do people,” and C uses a question mark instead of a period. That is the correct answer.
